name: portfolio-root
description: Root package for PortFolio - Force Sync

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: npm install && cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
